name: Temporal Freeze
description: This algorithm is an audio ‘freeze’ effect – it captures sound at a moment in time and sustains it indefinitely. The ‘temporal’ part of the name indicates that it works in the time domain, in contrast to the Spectral Freeze algorithm (above). There are a number (depending on the specification) of different ‘voices’ i.e. you can freeze different moments of audio and play them simultaneously. You can also layer up new audio on top of existing freezes.

specifications.name: History
specifications.description: The length of the history stored for each voice.

parameters.name: Freeze toggle
parameters.description: Activates a new freeze when the parameter changes from ‘0’ to ‘1’.

parameters.name: Freeze gate
parameters.description: Activates a new freeze when the parameter changes from ‘0’ to ‘1’, and releases the freeze when the parameter changes from ‘1’ to ‘0’.

parameters.name: Freeze target
parameters.description: Chooses the voice for the next freeze, or ‘0’ for ‘Auto’.

parameters.name: Unfreeze all
parameters.description: When this parameter changes to ‘1’, all active freezes are released.

parameters.name: Auto voices
parameters.description: When the freeze target is Auto, sets how many voices will be used by the automatic voice selection. The remainder can be frozen manually.

parameters.name: Length
parameters.description: Sets the amount of audio just preceding the moment of the freeze to use.

parameters.name: Play heads
parameters.description: Sets the number of ‘playback heads’ (to use a tape metaphor).

parameters.name: Octave down heads
parameters.description: Sets how many of the playback heads run at half speed i.e. an octave down.

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: Applies a gain to the algorithm outputs.

parameters.name: Attack
parameters.description: Sets the envelope attack time. Exponential scale from 0.01s to 30s.

parameters.name: Release
parameters.description: Sets the envelope release time. Exponential scale from 0.01s to 30s.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Sets the envelope mode: ‘Normal’ or ‘Complete attack’. In the latter mode, the envelope attack segment always completes, even if the gate is released during the attack, which is useful to trigger long swells from a short trigger pulse.

parameters.name: Layer fade
parameters.description: The amount by which old material fades out when a new layer is added.

parameters.name: Layer time
parameters.description: The crossfade time when adding a new layer. Exponential scale from 0.1s to 10s.

parameters.name: Pedal style
parameters.description: The style of pedal gesture that will release a freeze - ‘Long hold’ or ‘Double tap’.

parameters.name: Pedal hold time
parameters.description: The time required to hold a pedal to release a freeze, if the pedal style is ‘Long hold’.

parameters.name: Double tap time
parameters.description: The time during which a pedal must be double-tapped to release a freeze, if the pedal style is ‘Double tap’.

parameters.name: Freeze
parameters.description: Activates a new freeze on the corresponding voice when the parameter changes from ‘0’ to ‘1’, and releases the freeze when the parameter changes from ‘1’ to ‘0’.

parameters.name: Layer
parameters.description: Triggers the addition of a layer when the parameter changes from ‘0’ to ‘1’.

parameters.name: Pedal
parameters.description: Controls the ‘pedal’ interface to the voice.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Left/mono input
input_ports.description: Sets the left or mono input audio bus.

input_ports.name: Right input
input_ports.description: Sets the right input audio bus.

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: The left or mono output signal from the voice.

output_ports.name: Right output
output_ports.description: The right output signal from the voice.

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: Sets the left output bus for the voice.

output_ports.name: Right output
output_ports.description: Sets the right output bus for the voice.
